title.en: How Much Static Structure Do Code Agents Need? A Study of Deterministic Anchoring
title.zh: 代码智能体需要多少静态结构？关于确定性锚定效应的研究

abstract: LLM-based code agents navigate repositories through keyword search but miss the structural relationships, such as call graphs, inheritance hierarchies, and configuration dependencies, that define how software actually works. This makes agent navigation stochastic and difficult to reproduce across runs. We investigate whether lightweight static analysis can provide deterministic anchors for these agents: stable structural facts injected as plain-text comments that constrain probabilistic exploration and make navigation more predictable. Starting from a strong baseline, Codex from OpenAI, we systematically inject varying granularities of structural annotations and measure their effects on localization, trajectory behavior, and run-to-run stability. Our study identifies what we call the deterministic anchoring effect: static structure helps less by making agents "smarter" and more by making their navigation disciplined and reproducible. Three observations support this finding: (1) Anchoring works: lightweight call/inheritance topology improves function-level localization (+2.2pp Func@5) and shortens trajectories (-1.6 interaction rounds); (2) Anchoring is scale-sensitive: the optimal granularity and directionality depend on repository characteristics, where denser semantics show diminishing returns and hub-heavy projects benefit from inverse-only links that expose "who-calls-me" without forward edges; (3) Anchoring stabilizes: tags raise link-following rate from 0.15-0.18 to 0.21-0.24, roughly halve run-to-run variance, and improve single-run reliability (Pass@1 +3.4 pp) on medium-scale repositories, at the cost of roughly 10% more input tokens. These observations suggest practical guidelines: default to lightweight topology on medium projects, prune forward edges in large repositories, and reserve dense tags for implicit-dependency cases.
comment: Accepted to the ACM SIGSOFT International Symposium on Software Testing and Analysis (ISSTA 2026). 21 pages

relevance.en: This paper extends your interest in repository-level code generation by showing that lightweight static structure injected as comments improves navigation stability and localization without any post-training, though it is tangential to your focus on RLHF or execution feedback since it operates purely at inference time.
relevance.zh: 本文通过展示作为注释注入的轻量级静态结构能在无需后续训练的情况下改善导航稳定性和定位精度，扩展了你对仓库级代码生成的兴趣，尽管它与你关注的RLHF或执行反馈相关性较间接，因为它纯在推理时运行。

figures.label: Figure 1

caption.en:
The framework of CodeAnchor: Offline static analysis (PyCG call graphs + AST extractors) generates
structured tags encoding call/inheritance/data-flow relationships, which are injected into source files as plain-
text comments. At runtime, the grep-first agent retrieves code with embedded tags, enabling structure-guided
navigation without changing the agent loop.
Across these questions, our primary lens is behavioral: we treat trajectory quality and stability
as first-class outcomes and interpret function-level localization gains as secondary evidence that
injected structure is genuinely used rather than ignored. We release the implementation, tag-
ging pipeline, and evaluation traces as open source at https://github.com/mathieu0905/Code-
Anchor.
In summary, our study identifies what we call the deterministic anchoring effect: static struc-
ture helps less by making agents “smarter” and more by making their navigation disciplined and
reproducible. Three observations support this finding: ❶Anchoring works: lightweight call/inher-
itance topology improves function-level localization (+2.2pp Func@5) and shortens trajectories
(−1.6 interaction rounds) (Section 5.2); ❷Anchoring is scale-sensitive: optimal granularity and
directionality depend on repository scale, with hub-heavy projects favoring inverse-only links
(Section 5.3); ❸Anchoring stabilizes: tags raise link-following rate from 0.15–0.18 to 0.21–0.24
and roughly halve run-to-run variance (Section 5.4). These gains cost ∼9.9% more input tokens on
Lite, motivating practical guidelines: default to lightweight topology on medium projects, prune
forward edges in large repositories, and reserve dense tags for implicit-dependency cases.
caption.zh:
CodeAnchor框架：离线静态分析（PyCG调用图 + AST提取器）生成结构化标签，编码调用/继承/数据流关系，这些标签作为纯文本注释注入源文件。在运行时，grep优先的智能体检索带有嵌入标签的代码，从而在不改变智能体循环的情况下实现结构引导的导航。
在这些问题中，我们的主要视角是行为层面的：我们将轨迹质量和稳定性视为首要结果，并将函数级定位增益解释为注入结构确实被使用而非忽略的次级证据。我们以开源形式发布了实现、标签生成管道和评估轨迹，地址为https://github.com/mathieu0905/Code-Anchor。
总结而言，我们的研究识别了我们所谓的确定性锚定效应：静态结构帮助较少通过使智能体“更聪明”，而更多通过使其导航规整且可复现。三个观察结果支持这一发现：❶锚定有效：轻量级调用/继承拓扑提升了函数级定位（+2.2个百分点的Func@5）并缩短了轨迹（-1.6个交互轮次）（第5.2节）；❷锚定对规模敏感：最佳粒度和方向性取决于仓库规模，枢纽密集型项目更偏爱仅逆向链接（第5.3节）；❸锚定起稳定作用：标签将链接跟随率从0.15-0.18提升至0.21-0.24，并将运行间方差大致减半（第5.4节）。这些增益在Lite上以约9.9%的额外输入标记为代价，从而激励了实用指导方针：在中等项目上默认使用轻量级拓扑，在大型仓库中修剪前向边，为隐式依赖情况保留密集标签。

figures.reference_text: relationships that organize real software: who calls whom, how configuration values propagate, which classes inherit from which base, or how data flows between modules. Whether a line is relevant to a bug depends not only on its keyword overlap with a query but also on where it sits in this structural topology. This mismatch has two critical consequences. First, agents must rediscover structural links through ad-hoc multi-hop queries, resulting in fragmented, locally myopic context. Second, LLM controllers are inherently stochastic: small perturbations in early searches cascade into qualitatively different navigation paths. When coupled with structure-blind retrieval, this produces brittle trajectories: two runs on the same task may visit different files, take different numbers of steps, and produce different patches, even when the final outcome is identical. Recent work on agent trajectories similarly highlights the sensitivity of tool-using agents to exploration decisions and early branching [51]. From a software engineering perspective, this behavioral unpredictability is a critical quality concern: practitioners need agent behavior to be inspectable and reproducible, not merely correct in aggregate [6, 9]. Our goal is therefore to understand the marginal value of static structure when added to already-strong grep-first agents. We start from a baseline that already outperforms graph- based alternatives by a wide margin (Section 3), ask what additional benefit lightweight s

figures.label: Figure 2

caption.en:
Motivating example: pure grep-style keyword search is lexical and noisy, while inline CodeAnchor
tags surface structured breadcrumbs (e.g., callers/callees and next-file hints) to guide navigation.
resulting structural facts back into the codebase as compact structured comments (CodeAnchor
tags), and let the agent continue using its familiar grep-based retrieval over both raw code and these
annotations. When the agent opens a function, the surrounding tags already reveal its callers, call
targets, and upstream configuration, short-circuiting the multi-hop searches that would otherwise
be needed. We keep the underlying agent loop, tools, and model fixed, and study this design on
SWE-bench Lite and Verified [26].
A natural alternative is to expose structure via an explicit MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool
(e.g., LSP “find references” [36]). However, in a pilot on 20 SWE-bench tasks with an optional
call-graph tool, we observed low tool-use rates: the agent typically relied on plain grep instead.
This motivates our “passive injection” stance: surface structural context inline, right next to the code
the agent opens, so that following structure does not require an explicit tool-usage decision. We also
choose to strengthen a grep-first loop rather than build a new graph-guided controller because our
goal is to study the marginal impact of static structure on architectures that practitioners already
deploy. To validate this focus, we benchmarked LocAgent [16] on SWE-bench Lite under matched
conditions: the graph agent trails grep-first by 23.7pp (59.5% vs. 83.2% Func@5: top-5 predictions
cover all ground-truth functions; see Section 5 for full definitions of File@𝑘and Func@𝑘, Table 1).
Analysis reveals clear grep-based failure modes: function-level failures where the agent stops
at call sites without reaching private implementations. Textual evidence finds the right file, but
disambiguating similarly named functions requires explicit knowledge of who calls whom. These
observations motivate our design: keep grep-first tools fixed, and inject just enough static structure
to repair multi-hop and disambiguation failures.
caption.zh:
动机示例：纯grep风格的关键词搜索是词汇化的且带噪声的，而内联CodeAnchor标签则呈现结构化路径标记（例如，调用者/被调用者和下一个文件提示）以引导导航。
将产生的结构事实作为紧凑的结构化注释（CodeAnchor标签）反馈到代码库中，让智能体继续在原始代码和这些注释上使用其熟悉的基于grep的检索。当智能体打开一个函数时，周围的标签已经揭示了其调用者、调用目标和上游配置，从而绕开了原本需要的多跳搜索。我们保持底层的智能体循环、工具和模型不变，并在SWE-bench Lite和Verified [26]上研究此设计。
一个自然的替代方案是通过显式的MCP（模型上下文协议）工具（例如LSP的“查找引用”[36]）暴露结构。然而，在20个SWE-bench任务的试点实验中加入一个可选的调用图工具后，我们观察到工具使用率很低：智能体通常依赖纯grep。这激发了我们的“被动注入”立场：内联地、紧邻智能体打开的代码展示结构上下文，从而使遵循结构不需要显式的工具使用决策。我们还选择强化grep优先循环而不是构建新的图引导控制器，因为我们的目标是研究静态结构对从业者已部署架构的边际影响。为了验证这一重点，我们在匹配条件下对SWE-bench Lite上的LocAgent [16]进行了基准测试：图智能体在Func@5上落后grep优先方法23.7个百分点（59.5% vs 83.2%：前5个预测覆盖所有真实函数；完整定义请见第5节File@k和Func@k及表1）。
分析揭示了清晰的基于grep的失败模式：函数级失败——智能体停留在调用点而未能到达私有实现。文本证据找到了正确的文件，但区分同名函数需要显式地知道谁调用谁。这些观察结果激发了我们的设计：保持grep优先工具不变，只注入足够的静态结构来修复多跳和消歧失败。

figures.reference_text: For the agents we study, the core interaction pattern is a retrieve-then-read loop: the agent issues text queries against the repository, opens matching snippets, updates its hypothesis, and repeats. Tools such as grep or BM25 [45] treat the codebase as unstructured text and rank by lexical relevance. With modern reasoning models, this has become a hard-to-beat baseline: grep supplies broad candidates, the LLM supplies precision. What this view still lacks is connectivity. Hybrid retrieval (e.g., BM25 + embedding reranking [30]) improves matching but still returns independent text spans without making call, inheritance, or configuration/data-flow links explicit. Yet whether a location is relevant to a bug depends on how it sits in the program’s structure—which configuration values reach it, which functions it calls or overrides, and which downstream components it affects. Consider a configuration-driven bug as a running example (shown in Figure 2). Changing a single timeout in a YAML file may indirectly affect a database connection pool, a circuit breaker, and a load balancer, each implemented in different modules. An engineer investigating such an incident usually follows a structural chain: identify the configuration, find all its uses, understand how the value is transformed, and reason about the downstream components. A structure-blind agent, in contrast, must rediscover each link via additional searches. The result is a fragmented, locally myopic view: the agent may see

Across these questions, our primary lens is behavioral: we treat trajectory quality and stability
as first-class outcomes and interpret function-level localization gains as secondary evidence that
injected structure is genuinely used rather than ignored. We release the implementation, tag-
ging pipeline, and evaluation traces as open source at https://github.com/mathieu0905/Code-
Anchor.
In summary, our study identifies what we call the deterministic anchoring effect: static struc-
ture helps less by making agents “smarter” and more by making their navigation disciplined and
reproducible. Three observations support this finding: ❶Anchoring works: lightweight call/inher-
itance topology improves function-level localization (+2.2pp Func@5) and shortens trajectories
(−1.6 interaction rounds) (Section 5.2); ❷Anchoring is scale-sensitive: optimal granularity and
directionality depend on repository scale, with hub-heavy projects favoring inverse-only links
(Section 5.3); ❸Anchoring stabilizes: tags raise link-following rate from 0.15–0.18 to 0.21–0.24
and roughly halve run-to-run variance (Section 5.4). These gains cost ∼9.9% more input tokens on
Lite, motivating practical guidelines: default to lightweight topology on medium projects, prune
forward edges in large repositories, and reserve dense tags for implicit-dependency cases.

在这些问题中，我们的主要视角是行为层面的：我们将轨迹质量和稳定性视为首要结果，并将函数级定位增益解释为注入结构确实被使用而非忽略的次级证据。我们以开源形式发布了实现、标签生成管道和评估轨迹，地址为https://github.com/mathieu0905/Code-Anchor。

Whether a line is relevant to a bug depends not only on its keyword overlap with a query but also on where it sits in this structural topology. This mismatch has two critical consequences. First, agents must rediscover structural links through ad-hoc multi-hop queries, resulting in fragmented, locally myopic context. brief_summary.en:
LLM-based code agents rely on keyword search to navigate repositories, but they miss structural relationships like call graphs and inheritance hierarchies. This makes their navigation stochastic and hard to reproduce—the same query can yield different results due to lexical noise, and multi-hop dependencies often fail. Prior work added explicit graph tools, but agents underutilize them, preferring plain grep even when structural tools are available. No systematic study had measured how injecting lightweight static structure as inline text annotations affects localization accuracy, trajectory efficiency, and run-to-run stability.

The paper introduces the *deterministic anchoring effect*: injecting lightweight static analysis results (e.g., call/inheritance topology) as plain-text comments into source files constrains probabilistic exploration, making navigation more disciplined and reproducible. Using the CodeAnchor framework, the authors show that lightweight topology improves function-level localization by +2.2pp Func@5, shortens trajectories by 1.6 interaction rounds, and roughly halves run-to-run variance on SWE-bench tasks. Inverse-only links (who-calls-me) outperform forward edges on large repositories, while denser tags show diminishing returns. The approach stabilizes agent behavior at inference time without requiring post-training or fine-tuning, offering practical guidelines for injecting structure based on repository scale.
brief_summary.zh:
基于LLM的代码智能体依赖关键词搜索来导航仓库，但会忽略调用图、继承层次等结构关系。这导致导航随机构建且难以复现——同一查询因词汇噪声可能产生不同结果，多跳依赖关系常常失败。先前工作添加了显式图工具，但智能体利用不足，即使结构工具可用也更倾向于纯grep。尚无系统性研究衡量向源代码中注入轻量级静态结构作为内联文本注释如何影响定位精度、轨迹效率和运行间稳定性。

本文引入了*确定性锚定效应*：将轻量级静态分析结果（例如调用/继承拓扑）作为纯文本注释注入源文件，约束随机探索，使导航更具规整性和可复现性。通过CodeAnchor框架，作者表明轻量级拓扑使函数级定位提升+2.2个百分点的Func@5，轨迹缩短1.6个交互轮次，并且在SWE-bench任务上将运行间方差大致减半。逆向链接（谁调用我）在大型仓库上优于前向边，而更密集的标签效果递减。该方法在推理时无需后续训练或微调即可稳定智能体行为，为根据仓库规模注入结构提供了实用指导。

problem.en: LLM-based code agents navigate software repositories using keyword search (e.g., grep) but fail to capture structural relationships such as call graphs, inheritance hierarchies, and configuration dependencies that define how software actually works. This makes agent navigation stochastic and difficult to reproduce across runs because the same query can yield different results depending on lexical noise, and multi-hop dependencies (e.g., finding the caller of a caller) require multiple searches that often fail. Prior work focused on building graph-aware controllers or adding explicit tool-use commands (e.g., LSP 'find references'), but these are underutilized in practice — pilots showed agents prefer plain grep even when structural tools are available. The concrete gap is that no systematic study had measured how injecting lightweight, deterministic static structure as inline text annotations affects localization accuracy, trajectory efficiency, and run-to-run stability in a grep-first agent loop. This matters because real-world bug fixing and code understanding require predictable, reproducible navigation.
problem.zh: 基于LLM的代码智能体使用关键词搜索（如grep）导航软件仓库，但无法捕获定义软件实际工作方式的结构关系，如调用图、继承层次和配置依赖。这使得智能体导航变为随机的且难以跨运行复现，因为同一查询可能因词汇噪声产生不同结果，并且多跳依赖关系（例如，寻找调用者的调用者）需要多次搜索且常常失败。先前工作侧重于构建图感知控制器或添加显式工具使用命令（例如，LSP的'find references'），但这些在实践中利用不足——试点实验显示，即使结构工具可用，智能体也更倾向于纯grep。具体差距在于，尚无系统性研究衡量将轻量级、确定性的静态结构作为内联文本注释注入到以grep优先的智能体循环中，如何影响定位精度、轨迹效率和运行间稳定性。这一点很重要，因为真实世界的错误修复和代码理解需要可预测、可复现的导航。

solution.en: The main contribution is the deterministic anchoring effect: injecting lightweight static analysis results (e.g., call/inheritance topology) as plain-text comments into source files constrains the probabilistic exploration of LLM-based code agents, making navigation more disciplined and reproducible. Unlike prior work that either uses explicit graph tools (often ignored) or builds entirely graph-guided controllers (which underperform — LocAgent trails grep-first by 23.7pp on Func@5), this approach strengthens the existing grep-first loop by embedding structural facts directly next to the code. The key insight is that as long as the agent opens a file (which it will during grep searches), it automatically sees structured breadcrumbs, short-circuiting multi-hop searches without requiring an explicit tool-usage decision. The design is 'passive injection' — no changes to the agent loop or model — and is evaluated by systematically varying granularity and directionality of annotations.
solution.zh: 主要贡献是确定性锚定效应：将轻量级静态分析结果（例如调用/继承拓扑）作为纯文本注释注入源文件，约束基于LLM的代码智能体的随机探索，使导航更具规整性和可复现性。与先前使用显式图工具（常被忽略）或构建完全由图引导的控制器（表现较差——LocAgent在Func@5上落后grep优先方法23.7个百分点）的工作不同，本方法通过将结构事实直接嵌入代码附近来强化现有的grep优先循环。关键洞察在于，只要智能体打开一个文件（在执行grep搜索时会发生），它就能自动看到结构化路径标记，从而无需显式的工具使用决策即可绕过多跳搜索。该设计是'被动注入'——不改变智能体循环或模型——并通过系统性地变化注释的粒度和方向性进行评估。

methodology.en: The framework, called CodeAnchor, operates in two phases. First, offline static analysis uses PyCG for call graphs and AST extractors for inheritance and data-flow relationships to generate structured tags (e.g., 'Callers: funcA, funcB; Callees: funcC'). These tags are injected into source files as plain-text comments (e.g., '# @callers: funcA'). At runtime, the existing grep-first agent (based on Codex from OpenAI) issues text queries, retrieves matching files, opens them, and reads both code and injected tags. The agent loop, tools, and model are kept fixed. The study experiments with varying tag granularities: (i) lightweight (only call/inheritance topology), (ii) denser semantics (adding data flow and configuration dependencies), and (iii) directionality variants (forward-only edges 'who-I-call', inverse-only edges 'who-calls-me', and full bidirectional). Inputs are GitHub issue descriptions for SWE-bench tasks; outputs are predicted file and function locations. The baseline is a plain grep-first Codex agent with no injected tags. The approach adds roughly 9.9% more input tokens on average. Figure 1 depicts this framework: offline static analysis generates structured tags injected as comments; at runtime, the agent retrieves code with embedded tags, enabling structure-guided navigation without changing the agent loop.
methodology.zh: 该框架称为CodeAnchor，分为两个阶段。首先，离线静态分析使用PyCG生成调用图，并使用AST提取器提取继承和数据流关系，以生成结构化标签（例如，'调用者: funcA, funcB; 被调用者: funcC'）。这些标签作为纯文本注释（例如，'# @callers: funcA'）注入源文件。在运行时，现有的grep优先智能体（基于OpenAI的Codex）发出文本查询，检索匹配文件，打开它们，并读取代码和注入的标签。智能体循环、工具和模型保持不变。研究尝试了不同的标签粒度：(i) 轻量级（仅调用/继承拓扑），(ii) 更密集的语义（添加数据流和配置依赖），以及(iii) 方向性变体（仅前向边'我调用谁'，仅逆向边'谁调用我'，以及全双向）。输入是SWE-bench任务的GitHub问题描述；输出是预测的文件和函数位置。基线是没有注入标签的纯grep优先Codex智能体。该方法平均增加约9.9%的输入标记。图1描绘了该框架：离线静态分析生成结构化标签并作为注释注入；在运行时，智能体检索嵌有标签的代码，从而在不改变智能体循环的情况下实现结构引导的导航。

experiments.en: Experiments are conducted on SWE-bench Lite (300 tasks) and SWE-bench Verified (500 tasks). The baseline is a plain grep-first Codex agent (no injected structure). They also compare against LocAgent, a graph-aware controller, but that trails by 23.7pp (59.5% vs. 83.2% Func@5). Metrics: Func@k (top-k predictions covering all ground-truth functions), File@k, Pass@1 (single-run reliability), link-following rate, trajectory length (interaction rounds), and run-to-run variance across 5 runs. Key results: (1) Lightweight call/inheritance topology improves function-level localization by +2.2pp Func@5 and shortens trajectories by -1.6 interaction rounds on Lite. (2) On large repositories, inverse-only links (who-calls-me) outperform forward edges: raising link-following rate from 0.15-0.18 to 0.21-0.24 and roughly halving variance. (3) Pass@1 improves by +3.4pp on medium-scale repositories. (4) Denser tags show diminishing returns — no significant gain beyond lightweight+inverse. (5) Figure 3 shows target-file hit probability over steps: CodeAnchor tags sustain higher early hit rates on both datasets. (6) Paired analysis gives Func@10 Δ= +0.036 (95% CI [0.008, 0.068]; Wilcoxon p=0.0625, rrb=0.78). (7) Variance drops: standard deviation of sub-trajectory length reduces from 0.12 to 0.0626.
experiments.zh: 实验在SWE-bench Lite（300个任务）和SWE-bench Verified（500个任务）上进行。基线是纯grep优先的Codex智能体（无注入结构）。他们还与图感知控制器LocAgent进行了比较，但后者落后23.7个百分点（59.5% vs 83.2%的Func@5）。指标：Func@k（覆盖所有真实函数的top-k预测）、File@k、Pass@1（单次运行可靠性）、链接跟随率、轨迹长度（交互轮次）和跨5次运行的运行间方差。关键结果：(1) 轻量级调用/继承拓扑将函数级定位提升+2.2个百分点的Func@5，并在Lite上将轨迹缩短-1.6个交互轮次。(2) 在大型仓库上，逆向链接（谁调用我）优于前向边：将链接跟随率从0.15-0.18提升至0.21-0.24，并且方差大致减半。(3) 在中等规模仓库上，Pass@1提升+3.4个百分点。(4) 更密集的标签显示效果递减——轻量级+逆向之外无显著增益。(5) 图3显示了随时间变化的命中目标文件概率：CodeAnchor标签在两个数据集上都维持了更高的早期命中率。(6) 配对分析给出Func@10的Δ= +0.036（95%置信区间[0.008, 0.068]；Wilcoxon检验p=0.0625，rrb=0.78）。(7) 方差下降：子轨迹长度的标准差从0.12降至0.0626。

conclusion.en: The study finds that lightweight static structure (call/inheritance topology) improves code agent localization accuracy, shortens trajectories, and roughly halves run-to-run variance, primarily by making navigation disciplined and reproducible rather than by making agents smarter. This deterministic anchoring effect reduces the need for large-scale post-training or fine-tuning, as it stabilizes behavior through simple annotation injection at inference time. Practical guidelines emerge: default to lightweight topology for medium projects, prune forward edges in large repositories to avoid hub-spamming, and reserve dense tags for projects with implicit dependencies. The approach offers a lightweight, inference-time intervention that enhances reliability and predictability, though optimal tag granularity requires per-project tuning and token overhead may be significant for large tasks.
conclusion.zh: 研究发现，轻量级静态结构（调用/继承拓扑）提升了代码智能体的定位精度，缩短了轨迹，并将运行间方差大致减半，这主要通过使导航规整且可复现实现，而非使智能体更聪明。这种确定性锚定效应减少了对大规模后续训练或微调的需求，因为它通过推理时简单的注释注入稳定了行为。实用指导方针随之产生：对于中等项目默认使用轻量级拓扑，在大型仓库中修剪前向边以避免枢纽泛滥，并为含有隐式依赖的项目保留密集标签。该方法提供了一种轻量级、推理时的干预，增强了可靠性和可预测性，但最佳标签粒度需要针对每个项目进行调整，并且标记开销对于大型任务可能显著。

question.en: How does the deterministic anchoring effect compare to or complement post-training techniques like reinforcement learning with execution feedback for improving code agent performance on real-world software engineering tasks?
question.zh: 确定性锚定效应如何与强化学习结合执行反馈等后续训练技术比较或互补，以改善代码智能体在真实世界软件工程任务上的表现？

Therefore, it provides no evidence on how deterministic anchoring compares to or complements such techniques.

question.en: Given the paper's focus on localization accuracy (Func@k) as a metric, how could the deterministic anchoring approach be integrated into more comprehensive benchmarks that measure compilation, execution, and integration with existing codebases?
question.zh: 鉴于本文重点关注定位精度（Func@k）这一指标，确定性锚定方法如何整合到衡量编译、执行及与现有代码库集成的更全面基准中？

reason.en: The user cares about benchmarks beyond pass@k. This question explores how the paper’s methodology could enhance evaluation of code agents on holistic tasks like compilation and execution, directly addressing the user's interest in new evaluation methodologies.
reason.zh: 用户关心超越pass@k的基准。此问题探讨本文的方法如何增强对智能体在编译和执行等整体任务上的评估，直接回应用户对新评估方法论的兴趣。

answer.en: The paper does not directly address compilation, execution, or integration benchmarks; its evaluation is confined to localization accuracy (Func@k) and trajectory stability. However, its findings suggest a potential pathway: by providing deterministic anchors (lightweight static structure), agents could more reliably navigate to correct code locations, which is a prerequisite for compilation and execution. For integration with existing codebases, the paper notes that "anchoring works" and "stabilizes" agent behavior (e.g., "tags raise link-following rate from 0.15-0.18 to 0.21-0.24, roughly halve run-to-run variance"). Such stability could reduce flakiness in holistic tasks, but the paper offers no evidence on compilation or execution success.
answer.zh: 本文未直接涉及编译、执行或集成基准测试；其评估仅限于定位精度（Func@k）和轨迹稳定性。然而，其发现表明了一条潜在路径：通过提供确定性锚点（轻量级静态结构），智能体可以更可靠地导航到正确的代码位置，这是编译和执行的前提条件。关于与现有代码库的集成，本文指出“锚定有效”并“稳定”了智能体行为（例如，“标签将链接跟随率从0.15-0.18提升至0.21-0.24，运行间方差大致减半”）。这种稳定性可能减少整体任务的易变性，但论文未提供关于编译或执行成功的证据。

question.en: The paper shows that forward edges lead to diminishing returns in large repositories. How might this insight guide the development of adaptive static analysis injection strategies that could be learned via post-training techniques like reinforcement learning?
question.zh: 本文显示前向边在大型仓库中效果递减。这一洞察如何指导通过强化学习等后续训练技术学习的自适应静态分析注入策略的开发？

reason.en: Combines the user's interest in post-training (RL) with the paper's scale-sensitive findings. It probes whether RL could learn optimal annotation strategies, bridging static analysis and learning-based methods.
reason.zh: 结合了用户对后续训练（RL）的兴趣与本文对规模敏感的发现。它探究RL是否可学习最优注释策略，从而桥接静态分析与基于学习的方法。

answer.en: The paper's finding that forward edges lead to diminishing returns in large repositories directly motivates an adaptive injection strategy where a reinforcement learning agent learns to prune or omit forward edges for large, hub-heavy projects. The authors explicitly recommend to "prune forward edges in large repositories" and note that "hub-heavy projects benefit from inverse-only links that expose 'who-calls-me' without forward edges." This suggests that a static analysis injection policy should not be one-size-fits-all; instead, an RL agent could learn to select annotation granularity and directionality based on repository characteristics (e.g., size, hub density) to maximize localization gains while minimizing token overhead. The paper also observes that "the optimal granularity and directionality depend on repository characteristics," providing a clear learning signal: the RL policy could be trained to choose between lightweight topology, inverse-only links, or dense tags per repository, using the observed diminishing returns as a reward penalty for unnecessary forward edges in large repos.
answer.zh: 本文关于前向边在大型仓库中效果递减的发现直接激发了自适应注入策略，其中强化学习智能体可学习为大型、枢纽密集的项目修剪或省略前向边。作者明确建议“在大型仓库中修剪前向边”，并指出“枢纽密集型项目受益于仅暴露‘谁调用我’的逆向链接而不包含前向边”。这表明静态分析注入策略不应一刀切；相反，RL智能体可根据仓库特征（例如大小、枢纽密度）学习选择注释粒度和方向性，以最大化定位增益同时最小化标记开销。本文还观察到“最佳粒度和方向性取决于仓库特征”，提供了清晰的学习信号：RL策略可训练为每个仓库在轻量级拓扑、逆向链接或密集标签之间进行选择，将观察到的效果递减作为对大型仓库中不必要前向边的奖励惩罚。

question.en: To what extent does the deterministic anchoring effect reduce the need for large-scale post-training or fine-tuning by making agent behavior more predictable and reproducible?
question.zh: 确定性锚定效应在多大程度上通过使智能体行为更可预测和可复现来减少对大规模后续训练或微调的需求？

reason.en: Directly addresses the user's theme of post-training. The paper's finding that structure stabilizes behavior suggests a potential trade-off between static guidance and learning, motivating a discussion on resource allocation in code agent development.
reason.zh: 直接回应用户关于后续训练的主题。本文发现结构能稳定行为，暗示静态指导和基于学习的方法之间存在潜在的权衡，促使讨论代码智能体开发中的资源分配。

answer.en: The paper directly addresses this question by demonstrating that deterministic anchoring reduces the need for large-scale post-training or fine-tuning. Specifically, the authors find that static structure works "not by making agents 'smarter' and more by making their navigation disciplined and reproducible." This predictability is achieved through simple annotation injection rather than additional training. The anchoring effect is shown to "stabilize" behavior: tags "raise link-following rate from 0.15-0.18 to 0.21-0.24, roughly halve run-to-run variance, and improve single-run reliability (Pass@1 +3.4 pp)." These improvements come "at the cost of roughly 10% more input tokens"—a lightweight intervention that does not require model retraining or fine-tuning. The paper explicitly contrasts this approach with making agents "smarter" through learning, instead emphasizing behavioral discipline.
answer.zh: 本文通过展示确定性锚定可减少对大规模后续训练或微调的需求，直接回应了此问题。具体而言，作者发现静态结构“起作用不是通过让智能体‘更聪明’，而是更多通过使其导航规整且可复现。”这种可预测性通过简单的注释注入实现，无需额外训练。锚定效应被证明能“稳定”行为：标签“将链接跟随率从0.15-0.18提升至0.21-0.24，运行间方差大致减半，并将单次运行可靠性（Pass@1）提升3.4个百分点。”这些改进“以大约10%更多的输入标记为代价”——这是一种无需模型重新训练或微调的轻量级干预。本文明确将此方法与通过学习使智能体“更聪明”的方法形成对比，转而强调行为纪律。
